tree.name: Zach LaVine
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: SAC sent De'Aaron Fox and Jordan McLaughlin to SAS; SAC sent Kevin Huerter to CHI; CHI sent Zach LaVine and a 2028 2nd round pick (CHI own) to SAC; SAS sent Zach Collins, Tre Jones, and a 2025 1st round pick (CHI own, Noa Essengue) to CHI; SAS sent Sidy Cissoko, a 2025 2nd round pick (CHI own, Maxime Raynaud), a 2026 2nd round pick, a 2027 1st round pick (SAS own), a 2027 2nd round pick, a 2028 2nd round pick (DEN own), and a 2031 1st round pick (MIN own) to SAC
tree.note: 2-time All-Star guard, originally drafted 13th overall by Minnesota in 2014

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Huerter
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded Maurice Harkless, Justin Holiday, and a conditional 2024 1st round pick (SAC own, did not convey, became 2025 1st, Derik Queen selected) to Hawks for Kevin Huerter. Atlanta also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally drafted 19th overall by Atlanta in 2018

assetsGivenUp.name: Maurice Harkless
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran forward signed as free agent

assetsGivenUp.name: Justin Holiday
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Received from Pacers along with Sabonis and Jeremy Lamb for Tyrese Haliburton, Buddy Hield, and Tristan Thompson. Indiana also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with Domantas Sabonis trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Tyrese Haliburton
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard drafted 12th overall from Iowa State

assetsGivenUp.name: Buddy Hield
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded DeMarcus Cousins and Omri Casspi to Pelicans for Buddy Hield, Tyreke Evans, Langston Galloway, a 2017 1st round pick (Zach Collins, top-3 protected), and a 2017 2nd round pick (Frank Mason III, PHI own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard, originally drafted 6th overall by New Orleans in 2016

assetsGivenUp.name: Omri Casspi
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward re-signed as free agent (second stint with Kings)

assetsGivenUp.name: Tristan Thompson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: SAC sent Delon Wright to ATL; ATL sent Kris Dunn, Bruno Fernando, and a 2023 2nd round draft pick (Julian Phillips, POR own) to BOS; BOS sent Tristan Thompson to SAC. Boston also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Delon Wright
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded Cory Joseph, a 2021 2nd round pick (Luka Garza, LAL own), and a 2024 2nd round pick (SAC own, did not convey) to Pistons for Delon Wright. Sacramento also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick via LAL
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded Kenyon Martin Jr. to Rockets for cash and a 2021 2nd round pick (LAL own, Luka Garza)
assetsGivenUp.note: LAL own, acquired from HOU via Kenyon Martin Jr. trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick via SAC
assetsGivenUp.note: Sacramento's own 2nd round pick, did not convey

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#6) via SAC
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally conditional 2024 1st that did not convey, became 2025 1st
